description:
Two commands still read or write the legacy in-repo layout and break after the Phase 1B-5 flip: `bl remaster` and `bl init --bare`. Out of scope for the Phase 1B-2 / 1B-5 conformance gates, in scope for finishing bl-e802's "every `bl init` writes XDG" promise across all init shapes.

## Scope

### `bl remaster`

Pre-XDG, remaster wrote `state_url` / `state_branch` to `.balls/config.json` on the code branch. Post-XDG, the redirect is `.balls/tracker.json` on the code repo's own `balls/tasks` branch (SPEC §6.1). The federated tracker checkout under `trackers/<enc-state-url>/<enc-state-branch>/` is materialized by `Store::discover` on next run.

Rewire `cmd_remaster`:

- `bl remaster <url> [--branch B] [--commit]` writes `tracker.json` (`state_url`, optional `state_branch`) to the code repo's own `balls/tasks` branch checkout under XDG. `--commit` commits the tracker.json change on the orphan branch.
- `bl remaster --detach` removes `tracker.json` from the code repo's own `balls/tasks` branch.
- Update `tests/conformance_remaster.rs` fixtures.

### `bl init --bare`

`Store::init_bare` still writes `.balls/` under the bare clone, reads `.balls/config.json` from the source's `main`, and materializes a `.balls/state-repo`. Post-XDG the source has no `.balls/config.json` on `main` — it has `repo.json` + `project.json` on the source's `balls/tasks` branch.

Rewire bare init:
- Drop the loose `.balls/` reconstruction under the bare clone root.
- Materialize the XDG tracker checkout under the user's `~/.local/state/balls/trackers/<enc-source-origin>/<enc-balls-tasks>/` (single-branch clone of `balls/tasks` from `source`).
- The bare clone's identity is the source's origin URL (the `source` arg). `<nested-clone-path>` is the bare clone's absolute path.
- Update `tests/bare_*.rs` fixtures.

## Why it can land alone (after 1B-5)

`cmd_init --bare` and `cmd_remaster` are both flag-gated entry points. Migrating them does not change behavior on the default `bl init` path.

## Dependency

Depends on Phase 1B-5 (the main flip) so the rest of the binary is on XDG when remaster and bare init join.

## Conformance

`tests/conformance_remaster.rs` + `tests/bare_*.rs` (`bare_discovery`, `bare_hex_ids`, `bare_squash`) full pass-through.
title: Phase 1B-7: bl remaster + bl init --bare XDG-aware paths
